## LibraryRuntime.IConfectionBase.isRolledTruffle() method

Returns true if this is a rolled truffle confection. When true, rolled truffle-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isRolledTruffle(): this is IRolledTruffle;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IRolledTruffle](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.irolledtruffle.md)
